Debug.Name: Log fixed Active Effect keys
Debug.Hint: Print every corrected Active Effect key to the console.

Verbose.Name: Verbose logging
Verbose.Hint: Print all Active Effect keys inspected by this module, including keys that were not changed.

FixCPRLookup.Name: Fix CPR localized item lookup
FixCPRLookup.Hint: Let Cauldron of Plentiful Resources find automations for bilingual names such as 'Сглаз / Hex'.

SuppressCPRWarnings.Name: Suppress known CPR false warnings
SuppressCPRWarnings.Hint: Hide known false CPR warnings, currently the Fire Shield tour lookup warning.
